title: SPACEPLAN
description:
SPACEPLAN is an experimental piece of interaction based partly on a total misunderstanding of Stephen Hawking’s A Brief History of Time. Use manual clicks and the passage of time to create and launch potato-based devices and probes from your nondescript satellite orbiting a mysterious planet. Unlock the mysteries of the galaxy or just kill some time in what the astrophysics community is calling the ‘best narrative sci-fi clicker game of all times’.Features• Fifteen starchy items to unlock, create, and blast into the vacuum of space.

• Life affirming, silly story that will both captivate and help you kill time.

• Reveal the secrets of five different planets across two different realities.

• Banging soundtrack, as is customary in a narrative sci-fi clicker game.
description_short: SPACEPLAN is an experimental piece of interaction based partly on a total misunderstanding of Stephen Hawking’s A Brief History of Time.
